document.title: Tyler Technologies Tyler Identity Default Administrative Credentials

notes.text: All information products included in [https://github.com/cisagov/CSAF/tree/develop/csaf_files/IT/white](https://github.com/cisagov/CSAF/tree/develop/csaf_files/IT/white) are provided \"as is\" for informational purposes only. notes.title: Legal Notice

notes.text: Tyler Identity provider (TID-L) uses a documented, default administrative IDP credential. Users are not required to change the credentials before deployment.
notes.title: Risk Evaluation

notes.text: Change default passwords. TID-L has not been distributed since December 2020, and has not been supported since 2021.
notes.title: Recommended Practices

notes.text: Tyler Identity Local (TID-L) uses documented, default administrative credentials. Users are not required to change the credentials before deployment. TID-L has not been distributed since December 2020, and has not been supported since 2021.
notes.title: Description

vulnerabilities.title: Tyler Identity Local (TID-L) default administrative credentials

remediations.details: Product is no longer supported as of 2021. Change default credentials if necessary.
